name: Thoropass Compliance Automation API
what_it_does: Compliance automation platform with API for managing SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI DSS compliance programs — automating evidence collection, control monitoring, and audit preparation with 200+ integrations.
use_cases: Automating evidence collection from cloud infrastructure for SOC 2 audits
Monitoring compliance control status and generating audit-ready reports
Integrating compliance evidence collection into DevOps pipelines
Managing audit tasks and tracking remediation workflows programmatically
Querying compliance posture across frameworks for GRC dashboard agents
not_for: Technical security scanning (use Snyk or Wiz for vulnerabilities)
Policy enforcement — Thoropass tracks and reports compliance, not enforces
Organizations with no formal compliance requirements
best_when: A compliance team needs to automate SOC 2 evidence collection and audit preparation, integrating with 200+ tools to pull evidence automatically.
avoid_when: You need lightweight compliance checklists without automation — Thoropass is a full GRC platform investment.

auth.notes: API key for management API access. OAuth2 for integration connections to cloud providers and SaaS tools. Scoped access for read, write, and admin operations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription pricing based on frameworks and company size; contact sales
pricing.notes: Enterprise compliance platform. Annual contracts with onboarding assistance. Competitive with Vanta and Drata. Audit-readiness included in subscription. Auditor partnerships for faster certification.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API documentation less comprehensive than Vanta or Drata. REST API available for programmatic access. Webhook delivery for compliance events. Evidence collection integrations documented separately.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Evidence uploads are idempotent by source and timestamp. Control status reads are idempotent. Task creation may create duplicates without deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation less mature than competitors — expect gaps and rely on support
Integration setup requires OAuth flows with cloud providers — not fully automated
Compliance evidence has specific formatting requirements per framework
Audit scope must be defined before evidence collection is meaningful

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 compliant platform for compliance automation. OAuth2 for integration connections. TLS enforced. Handles sensitive compliance evidence — data handling practices critical to evaluate.
